; Comments on the same line don't work!

If you are on Linux, you can test Proton(Experimental) or other Versions
Specializes in melee combat and blocking enemies from progressing.
Archer ready to shoot at enemies from a distance.
Specializes in ranged combat using {r,Fire} and {B,Cold} spells that deal
Fragile tree that generates {o,Oranges} that are needed to summon Heroes and buy Upgrades.
Tangy uses her magic and {o,Oranges} to summon little Heroes to defend her.
Vile winged creatures that can fly past Defenders.
Bloodthirsty creatures that heal by inflicting bleeding.
Vile winged creatures that can fly past Defenders. Adapted to the cold, they are
Aggressive winged creatures that can fly past Defenders and attack anything in their path.
Flying mischievous creatures that are very difficult to take down.
Giant flying tentacle monster that chills all nearby enemies.
Fast, vicious rodents with sharp teeth.
Much faster, vicious rodents with sharp teeth.
Much tougher than normal Rats. They drop Chests when defeated!
Infected with the black plague. Revives upon death.
Undead, poisonous rodents with sharp teeth.
Fast, vicious creatures equiped with huge, sharp teeth that rip through skin. Their agility allows them to dodge melee attacks.
Fast and tough, vicious creatures equiped with huge, sharp teeth that rip through skin. Their agility allows them to dodge melee attacks.
With their frozen and razor sharp teeth, these beasts bring an ice cold death to even the toughest of warriors.
Tough evil humanoids that attack anything in their path.
Very Tough and resilient evil humanoids that attack anything in their path.
Evil humanoids equiped with a bow that focus weak targets.
Evil Shaman that heals nearby allies and shoots deadly Fireballs.
Tough evil humanoids that can block attacks.
Tough knight that can't be stunned or pushed back. His heavy Hammer stuns briefly on hit.
Long range siege weapon operated by evil humanoids. Very deadly to groups of heroes.
Goblins, but with a big saber, Yarrr!
Unchained meatball! Slams the ground, stunning nearby targets.
The King of Goblins is a fierce warrior that cut's down nearby targets and shoots at distant heroes with his Cannon.
Firece warrior that can widthstand even the strongest of attacks.
Very tough warriors that can regenerate health.
Very fast kamikaze bomber. Explodes on impact.
Very fast kamikaze bomber. Explodes in an icy mist on impact.
Mindless automatons that obey the orders of the Necro King, {r,Ignores Blockers}.
Mindless humanoids, immune to {G,Physical Damage}. Revives on death.
The Necromancer King, all Skeletons obey his command. Summons an army of bloodthirsty skeletons.
Buried Monsters that only reveal themselves when attacking their unsuspecting prey.
Very tough Buried Monsters that only reveal themselves when attacking their unsuspecting prey.
Very deadly Monsters with claws and sharp teeth that rip even through the toughest of armor. Buried underground, they only reveal themselves when attacking.
Very tough poisonous monster made out of wood and grass.
Translucent beings that are very hard to see.
Very tough and resilient boulders of ice. Teleport when hit.
Giant Golem of pure ice. Almost nothing can hurt this monstrosity, other than {r,Fire}.
Icy creature that freezes nearby enemies.
[h-2]{y,Additional Projectiles now add to Chain instead.}
[h-2]{y,Whenever Tangy successfully lifts Heroes, she gains {w,+1% Damage}.}
[h-2]{y,Lifted Heroes gain {w,40% Range} and {w,10% Damage} and can {w,Attack} while being carried.}
[h-2]{y,Marks primary targets Tangy is attacking, making them take {w,30% more Damage}.}
[h-2]{y,The Unit ignores Obstacles like Trees etc. Projectiles fly through them.}
[h-2]{y,Bleeds infliced on enemies heal this unit.}
{y,On Equip, place a banner that boosts nearby Heroes {w,Damge by +10%}.}
{y,On Equip, place a banner that boosts nearby Heroes {w,Health Regeneration}.}
{y,Every 8th attack causes a burst of thorns, dealing {w,Area Damage}.}
{y,Creates a Projectile that pierces all enemies hit, causing a small Knockback.
{y,Shields orbit around the unit, dealing damage to every Enemy they pass through.
{y,Absorbs a portion of damage nearby allies receive.
{y,Thrusts your weapon forward, applying {r,Bleed} to all enemies hit.
{y,Every 6th attack leaves behind a pool for fire on impact.}
{y,Toss a bottle of poison that leaves behind a toxic pool of gas upon impact.
{y,Every 6th attack expels a bolt of Lightning that chains through enemies, dealing less damage with each chain.}
{y,Expels a bolt of Lightning that chains through enemies, dealing less damage with each chain.}
{y,Creates a circle at the target Location healing friendly units inside.
{y,Every 6th attack releases a burst of Ice behind the target on impact.}
{y,Shoots multiple arrows in the air towards a target location, arrows explode on impact.
{y,Places a trap at the target location. Upon activation, it releases an icy blast.[h1]Base Cooldown {w,4s}}
{y,Summons a bunch of leaves that slowly shoot towards the {y,Attack Direction}.
{y,Throws weapons in a spiral outward, damaging all enemies hit.
{y,Upon death, revive instead at full Health.
{y,On Hit, summon a Totem near the target, decreasing their {w,Health by -20%}.
{y,On Hit, Teleports a group of enemies back down the path.
{y,When standing still, summon a Campfire that increases the {w,Health Regen} of nearby Heroes and their {w,Attack Speed}.}
{y,When standing still, summon a Cross that protects nearby Heroes.}
{y,Hurl a ball of fire that explodes on contact, dealing Area Damage.
{y,Shoot an arrow into the air, striking a target location.
{y,Heals all nearby allies by a flat amount of health.
{y,Shoots a big cannon ball towards a target location, dealing massive Area Damage.
{y,Slams the ground, {y,Stunning} all nearby Enemies and knocking them back.
{y,Upon contact with Enemies, the unit burst into an explosion dealing area damge.}
{y,Upon contact with Enemies, the unit burst into an icy explosion dealing area damge.}
{y,Shoots a poisonous ball that explosed on impact, leaving behind a cloud of Poison.
{y,Summons an army of undead to fight by your side.
{y,Creates a Projectile that follows the Target, dealing area damage on impact.
{y,On being hit, creates a barrier that protects the unit.
{y,On being hit, creates a barrier that protects the unit and freezes attackers.
{y,On death, curses the killer and all units around him. Cursed units dieal less damage for a duration}.
{y,On being hit, {y,Teleport} a great distance towards the next Tangy Tree.
{y,Strikes a Target Location with a Meteor dealing area damage.
{y,Blasts enemies within close proximity to you, dealing area damage and {b,freezing} them in place.
{y,Roots all nearby enemies in place and applies a {g,poisonous} debuff.
{y,Unleashes a series of Ice Spikes towards your target dealing area damage.
{y,Attack an Enemy two times with the second hit {y,Stunning} the target.
{y,Lightning strikes a target location dealing area damage.
{y,Bash enemies with the Shield, causing {w,Stun} and {w,Knockback}.
{y,Throws a Shield that deals damage and splits into multiple shards on impact.
{y,User activated Ability. {g,Heals} all Heroes inside the area.
{y,User activated Ability. Upon activation an Orange is dropped on the ground which explodes on impact.
{y,Shoots a stinger directly at an enemy.
{y,Dash through a target dealing damage to every enemy along the path.
{y,Spawns Ice Spikes in random locations that explode into deadly shards.
Place a Defender to stop the Goblins from getting through to Tangy [%d].
By defeating Enemies, {y,Tangy} gains {g,Skillpoints}. Spend them to grow more powerful!
Good! Now open the shop to buy an item.
Heroes use items to get more powerful.
Combining the same item will upgrade it!
The Goblins have taken away our {g,Healer}! Defeat them to free her!
Look, Tangy woke up! You can move her with [%d].
If you want the save to be repaired, please reach out to me:
Connect to {B,Steam} to see the leaderboard.
Climb the {y,leaderboard} by fighting through infinite waves to see how long you can last!
Are you sure you want to leave the level and return back to the skilltree?
Do not let a single Hero die, not even once.
Don't lose a single Live on the Tangy Tree.
Are you sure you want to restart?
Always show all Nodes in the Skilltree
Always Show all Stats, even when Zero
Earn stars if each Tangy Tree survives with:
The amount of {r,Health} regenerated per second.
The unit is immune to {r,Fire} and it's related effects.
The unit is immune to {b,Cold} and it's related effects.
The unit is immune to {y,Lightning} and it's related effects.
The unit is immune to {g,Poison} and it's related effects.
The amount in pixels an Enemy is {y,pushed} back.
The amount of speed in pixels/second.
The amount of {G,Physical Damage}, is reduced by {G,Armor}.
Chance to inflict {r,bleeding}, dealing 40% of {G,Physical Damage}/s.
The amount of {r,Bleed Damage} per second. Not affected by {G,Armor}.
The duration in seconds of {r,Bleed} inflicted.
{y,Area of Effect} is displayed as the {y,Radius} in pixels of the Area covered
Chance to block incomming {y,Hits}. {y,Ground Effects} are usually not considered a {y,Hit}.
Cooldown reduces the time an {y,Ability} is recharging.
The base amount of {0,Healing} done with {y,Abilities}. Usually {y,Abilities} add their own base amount of {0,Healing} on top.
Reduces the amount of {b,Magic Damage} taken.
Affects the duration of {y,Abilities} and {y,Effects} such as {r,Burn}, {b,Chill, Freeze}, {g,Poison}, {y,Stun} etc. Everything that has a duration is affected.
{r,Fire Damage} has a chance to inflict {r,Burn}, dealing 40% of the initial hit as {r,Burn Damage} over a duration.
The duration in seconds of {r,Burn} infliced.
The amount of {r,Burn Damage} per second.
The amount of {B,Cold Damage} inflicted. {B,Cold Damage} inflics {B,Chill}.
The percentage of {y,Slow} caused by {B,Chill Effect}
The duration in seconds of {B,Chill} infliced.
The duration in seconds of {B,Freeze} infliced.
The chance to {B,Freeze} when inflicting {B,Cold Damage}
Attacking shocked targets with {y,Lightning Damage} discharges them, dealing damage to surrounding targets.
{y,Lightning Damage} has a chance to inflict {y,Shock}.
Hits with {g,Poison Damage} have a chance to inflict {g,Poison}, dealing 40% of the initial hit as {g,Poison Damage} over a duration.
The duration in seconds of {g,Poison} infliced.
The number of {y,Targets} hit with {y,Area Attacks}. Sword swings are considered {y,Area Attacks}.
Global multiplier that is applied on top of {y,Damage over Time} effects such as, but not limited to, {r,Burn}, {g,Poison}, {r,Bleed} etc.
The number of times a {y,Projectile} can {y,Pierce} a Target before it disapears.
The number of times a {y,Projectile} can {y,Chain} a Target before it disapears. Each {y,Chain} reduces the {y,Damage} done by {y,40%}.{y,Chain} can only happen {r,after} {y,Pierce}.
The amount of {y,Damage Reduction} applied each time a {y,Projectile chains}.
The number of times a {y,Projectile} can {y,Split}. Each {y,Split} reduces the {y,Damage} done by {y,40%}. {y,Split} can only happen {r,after} {y,Chain}.
The amount of {y,Damage Reduction} applied when a {y,Projectile splits}.
The {y,Speed in Pixels} at which a {y,Projectile} flies.
A {y,Projectile} shot towards a {y,Target} will alter their flightpath based on the {y, Homing Strength} applied.
Heals all Heroes inside the area.
Heals two additional heroes, targets heroes with lowest health.
Applies a barrier that prevents damage while active.
Weak {g,Healing Mists} form close to groups of heroes, healing them slowly over time.
Lets you buy items to put on Heroes.
Buying items in the shop costs less.
The shop offers one free item at the start of the level.
Once every new round, you can reroll the shop for free.
The shop offers rare items more frequently
The shop now offers one additional item.
Target an area to strike the ground with an exploding orange.
Leaves behind a sticky juice that slows enemies and adds and additional Orange.
Explodes into smaller Oranges, covering a larger area.
Oranges hit the ground much faster and adds an additional Orange.
A much stronger juice is left behind that roots all enemies in place and burns them.
Grows oranges if a Hero is nearby.
The Orange Tree boosts the damage of nearby Heroes.
Increases the influence area of the Orange Tree.
Periodically roots nearby enemies in place, dealing poison damage over time.
Applies a more deadly poison to rooted enemies.
Time in seconds for how long {y,Projectiles} stay in the air.
Increases the Experience gained by Tangy.
The higher the {y,Stun Resist}, the less likely stunning effects such as {y,Stun} and {b,Freeze} occur.
Oranges are used to {y,Buy} and {y,Upgrade} Heroes.
{y,Banner Power} changes how strong the effect of {y,Banners} are.
The amount of {r,Enemies} that are blocked.
Chance to fully negate melee attacks.
Time it takes for fallen Heroes to revive.
Time it takes Tangy to fully lift Heroes.
{G,{r,Burns} stack and additional time but expire {y,50% faster}.}
{G,{r,Burns} deal {y,Double Damage}. Enemies affected by your {r,Burns} run {y,twice as fast}.}
{G,Enemies take {y,50% more Damage} from Bleeding while walking.}
{G,All impact damage can now {b,Freeze}, {b,Freeze Chance} is capped at {y,10%}}.
Upon killing an Enemy there is a chance to steal their item.
{G,Defenders placed alone can {y,block two additional} enemies.}
All Defender Heroes can block an additional Enemy, but deal {y,-20% Damage}.
{G,Projectiles have {y,-20% AOE} at the start of their movement, increasing up to {y,+50% AOE} as the projectile travels further.}
{G,Allows Rangers to be placed on Tree Stumps, increasing their {y,Range by +20%}. Projectiles also ingore collision with Obstacles.}
{G,Hits deal 50% less Damage, but Damage Over Time effects deal 100% more Damage.}
{G,Projectiles now also Split every time they Pierce or Chain.}
{G,Bleeding enemies that die explode, dealing 10% of their Maximum Life as {w,True Damage}.}

regex_error(error_paren): The expression contained mismatched ( and ).
